notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Check the URL or head back home.

stocking.title: Stocking
stocking.description: Track the stock of your product — manage metadata about product providers.

stock.title: Stock
stock.missingUnit: Set a default unit in Pricing to start tracking stock.
stock.quantityDescription: Quantity is counted in {{unit}} — pack sizes convert automatically wherever stock is shown.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Who this product is sourced from

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: One default unit, priced by cost and price — every pack size is built on top of it.

default.name: Name
default.pricedRelative: Every pack size is priced relative to this
default.profitDescription: How much the price is above or below the cost

variant.title: Pack sizes
variant.description: Offer bulk options like a box or a case, priced on top of {{base}}

empty.title: No units
empty.description: No units have been added yet

productBasic.description: The basics — name, handle, and description
productBasic.name: Name

placeholders.name: Enter product name
placeholders.autoDescription: We'll generate a short description from the product details
placeholders.manualDescription: Write a description for this product

handleDescription.auto: Generated automatically from the product name.
handleDescription.manual: Used in the product URL — lowercase, no spaces.

descriptionHelp.auto: Generated automatically once pricing and variants are set.
descriptionHelp.manual: Shown on the storefront and in search results.

productBasic.activeDescription: Product is visible in the catalog as soon as it's created.

create.title: New product
create.description: Create a new product and publish it when you're ready.

update.title: Edit product
update.description: Update the product information and keep your catalog up to date.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Pricing, variants, and provider details for {{product}}
overview.basePricingCaption: Per {{unit}} — the reference every variant is measured against
overview.variantsCaption: How each pack size compares, priced per {{unit}}

empty.title: No records yet
empty.description: You haven't created any records yet. Create your first one to get started.

notFound.title: No results found
notFound.description: No records match your search. Try another search term.

error.title: System error
